title: Develop Document and Periodically Update System Security Plans
description: develop, document, and periodically update system security plans that describe system boundaries, system environments of operation, how security requirements are implemented, and the relationships with or connections to other systems

checks.name: A System Security Plan is Developed
checks.purpose: Development of a system security plan is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: The System Boundary is Described and Documented in the SSP
checks.purpose: Description and documentation of the system boundary in the SSP is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: The System Environment of Operation is Described and Documented in the SSP
checks.purpose: Description and documentation of the system environment of operation in the SSP is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Non-Applicable Security Requirements are Identified in the SSP
checks.purpose: Identification of security requirements designated as non-applicable by the designated authority is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: The Method of Security Requirement Implementation is Described in the SSP
checks.purpose: Description of how each security requirement is implemented in the SSP is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Relationships and Connections to Other Systems are Described in the SSP
checks.purpose: Description of interconnections and relationships with other systems including ISAs and MOUs in the SSP is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: The Frequency to Update the SSP is Defined
checks.purpose: Definition of the SSP update frequency is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: The System Security Plan is Updated with the Defined Frequency
checks.purpose: Periodic update of the SSP at the defined frequency is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

remediation: Develop and maintain a comprehensive System Security Plan covering all required elements including system boundary, environment of operation, security requirement implementation descriptions, non-applicable requirements with justification, and system interconnections. Define an update frequency of at least annually or upon significant system changes. Ensure the SSP is reviewed and approved by organizational leadership and retained as evidence for CMMC assessments.
